title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Casa Grande - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Casa Grande - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
